tasks.subject: Task 1: Block owner verdicts (server guard + hide verdict UI)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A document owner receives 403 when POSTing a review verdict on their own document, and the verdict controls are not shown to the owner in the UI.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/api/documents/[id]/reviews/route.ts` (add owner 403 after participant check)
- Modify: `components/DocumentView.tsx` (wrap verdict controls in `!isOwner`)
- Test: `tests/unit/reviews.owner-block.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Owner POST to reviews → 403 `{ error: "owners cannot review their own document" }`
- [ ] Non-owner participant POST unchanged (200)
- [ ] Owner still a participant (GET/annotation flows unaffected)
- [ ] Verdict controls absent from DOM when `isOwner`

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/reviews.owner-block.test.ts` → PASS; full suite green.

**Steps:** TDD — seed owner+participant; add `if (await isOwner(user.id, id)) return 403` after the isParticipant check in the reviews route; wrap Approve/Request-changes JSX in `{!isOwner && (...)}`; tsc+lint clean; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/documents/[id]/reviews/route.ts", "components/DocumentView.tsx", "tests/unit/reviews.owner-block.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/reviews.owner-block.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["owner POST verdict 403", "non-owner participant 200", "owner still participant", "verdict controls hidden for owner"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: deleteDocument service with transactional cascade
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pure service function deletes a document and all dependents in dependency order, succeeding even when annotations/reviews reference versions via onDelete: Restrict.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/documents.ts` (add `deleteDocument`)
- Test: `tests/unit/documents.delete.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `deleteDocument(id)` removes the document with zero orphans across documentVersion/annotation/comment/review/documentParticipant/notification
- [ ] Succeeds with an applied suggestion (Annotation.appliedInVersion Restrict) and a review on a version (Review.onVersion Restrict)
- [ ] Runs in a single `$transaction`

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/documents.delete.test.ts` → PASS.

**Steps:** TDD — seed a fully-populated doc (annotation+comment, review on v1, applied suggestion); RED (not a function); implement `prisma.$transaction([review.deleteMany, annotation.deleteMany, document.delete])`; GREEN. Confirm field names against schema.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/documents.ts", "tests/unit/documents.delete.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/documents.delete.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no orphan rows after delete", "handles applied suggestion + review-on-version Restrict FKs", "single transaction"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: DELETE /api/documents/[id] owner-only route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** An owner can delete via HTTP; non-owners and strangers are rejected with the right status codes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/api/documents/[id]/route.ts` (add `DELETE` handler)
- Test: `tests/unit/documents.delete-route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Unauthenticated → 401; non-participant → 404; participant non-owner → 403; owner → 200 `{ ok: true }` and document gone

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/documents.delete-route.test.ts` → PASS.

**Steps:** TDD — mock requireUser for stranger/participant/owner; RED (DELETE not exported); implement handler with isParticipant 404 → isOwner 403 → deleteDocument(id) → {ok:true}; GREEN.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/documents/[id]/route.ts", "tests/unit/documents.delete-route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/documents.delete-route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["401 unauth", "404 non-participant", "403 participant non-owner", "200 owner + gone"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Owner delete button + confirm modal (UI)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** An owner sees a Delete button in the document header; confirming removes the document and navigates to /app.

**Files:**
- Modify: `components/DocumentView.tsx` (Delete button + confirm modal + handler)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Delete button visible only when `isOwner`
- [ ] Confirm calls DELETE /api/documents/[id] and on ok navigates to /app
- [ ] Cancel closes modal, no request

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && CI=true pnpm exec next lint` clean; manual delete redirects to /app.

**Steps:** add useRouter + confirmingDelete/deleting state + handleDelete (fetch DELETE → router.push('/app')); owner-only Delete button (data-testid=delete-document); confirm modal (Card, data-testid=confirm-delete); optional light e2e; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/DocumentView.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && CI=true pnpm exec next lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["delete button owner-only", "confirm triggers DELETE + redirect to /app", "cancel no request"]}
```
